galsyn#

class galsyn.GalaxySynthesizer(sim_file=None, z=0.01, filters=[], filter_transmission_path={})[source]#

A class to synthesize multi-wavelength galaxy images from simulation data.

This class orchestrates the process of taking particle data from a cosmological simulation, applying a stellar population synthesis (SSP) model (like FSPS or Bagpipes), accounting for dust attenuation and cosmological effects, and projecting the resulting light onto a 2D grid to create a synthetic astronomical image in specified filters.

Parameters:

  • sim_file (str, optional) – Path to the HDF5 simulation file. Defaults to None.

  • z (float, optional) – Redshift of the galaxy. Defaults to 0.01.

  • filters (list, optional) – List of filter names for which to generate images. e.g., [‘FUV’, ‘NUV’]. Defaults to [].

  • filter_transmission_path (dict, optional) – Dictionary mapping custom filter names to their transmission curve file paths. Defaults to {}.

property azimuth_angle_deg#

The azimuthal (rotation) angle for 2D projection in degrees.

Type:

float

property bump_amp#

UV bump amplitude. Defaults to 0.85.

property cosmo_str#

“planck18”, “planck15”, “planck13”, “wmap5”, “wmap7”, or “wmap9”. The check is case-insensitive.

Type:

str

Type:

The name of the cosmology model to be used. Valid options are

property dim_kpc#

The physical side length of the output image in kiloparsecs.

Type:

float or None

property dust_eta#

Ratio of the dust attenuation A_V in the birth clouds and the diffuse ISM. Defaults to 1.0.

property dust_index#

Dust index for diffuse ISM. Defaults to 0.0.

property dust_index_bc#

Dust index for birth clouds. Defaults to -0.7.

property dust_law#

The dust attenuation law to apply.

Options:
0: Modified Calzetti+00 with Bump strength tied to dust_index,

where dust_index itself depends on the line-of-sight A_V.

1: Modified Calzetti+00 with a free Bump strength (bump_amp),

where dust_index depends on the line-of-sight A_V.

2: Modified Calzetti+00 with Bump strength tied to dust_index,

where dust_index is a single free parameter for all stars.

3: Modified Calzetti+00 with both bump_amp and dust_index as

free parameters, applied uniformly to all stars.

4: Salim+18 attenuation law. 5: The original Calzetti+00 starburst attenuation law. 6: Small Magellanic Cloud (SMC) extinction law from Gordon+03. 7: Large Magellanic Cloud (LMC) extinction law from Gordon+03. 8: Milky Way (MW) extinction law from Cardelli, Clayton, & Mathis (1989). 9: Milky Way (MW) extinction law from Fitzpatrick (1999).

Type:

int

property filter_transmission_path#

Maps custom filter names to their transmission file paths.

Type:

dict

property filters#

A list of filter names for which to generate photometric images.

Type:

list

property flux_unit#

The unit for the output flux in the FITS image.

Type:

str

property gas_logu#

The gas ionization parameter for nebular emission modeling.

Type:

float

generate_ssp_data()[source]#

Checks for and resolves the path to the required SSP grid file.

If use_precomputed_ssp is True, this method verifies that the SSP data file exists. If ssp_filepath is not specified, it defaults to the packaged data file corresponding to the selected ssp_code.

Raises:

FileNotFoundError – If the required SSP file cannot be found.

property igm_type#

0 for Madau et al. 1995 and 1 for Inoue et al. 2014. Defaults to 0.

Type:

IGM absorption model type. Options are

property imf1#

Logarithmic slope of the IMF over the range 0.08 < M < 0.5 Msun.

Only used if ssp_code=FSPS and imf_type=2 (a Kroupa-like broken power-law). Default: 1.3.

Type:

float

property imf2#

Logarithmic slope of the IMF over the range 0.5 < M < 1.0 Msun.

Only used if ssp_code=FSPS and imf_type=2 (a Kroupa-like broken power-law). Default: 2.3.

Type:

float

property imf3#

Logarithmic slope of the IMF over the range 1.0 < M < 120 Msun.

Only used if ssp_code=FSPS and imf_type=2 (a Kroupa-like broken power-law). Default: 2.3.

Type:

float

property imf_lower_limit#

The lower limit of the IMF for FSPS, in solar masse. Defaults to 0.08

property imf_type#

FSPS initial mass function (IMF) type (e.g., 1 for Chabrier).

Type:

int

property imf_upper_limit#

The upper limit of the IMF for FSPS, in solar masses. Defaults to 120

property initdim_kpc#

Initial search dimension (kpc) for automatic image sizing.

Type:

float

property initdim_mass_fraction#

Mass fraction to enclose for automatic image sizing.

Type:

float

property mdave#

IMF parameter defined in Dave (2008).

Only used if ssp_code=FSPS and imf_type=4. Default: 0.5.

Type:

float

property name_out_img#

The path and filename for the output FITS image.

Type:

str or None

property ncpu#

The number of CPU cores to use for parallel processing.

Type:

int

property output_pixel_spectra#

If True, output a 3D spectral cube in addition to filter images.

Type:

bool

property pix_arcsec#

The side length of each square pixel in arcseconds.

Type:

float

property polar_angle_deg#

The polar (inclination) angle for 2D projection in degrees.

Type:

float

property relation_AVslope#

Defines the A_V vs dust_index relation. Can be a string with options of “Salim18”, “Nagaraj22”, and “Battisti19”, or a dictionary with “AV” and “dust_index” keys (1D arrays). Defaults to “Salim18”.

property rest_delta_wave#

Wavelength step (Angstroms) for the spectral cube.

Type:

float

property rest_wave_max#

Maximum rest-frame wavelength (Angstroms) for the spectral cube.

Type:

float

property rest_wave_min#

Minimum rest-frame wavelength (Angstroms) for the spectral cube.

Type:

float

run_synthesis()[source]#

Executes the full galaxy image synthesis process.

This is the main method to run the pipeline. It gathers all configured parameters, selects the appropriate backend (FSPS or Bagpipes), calls the corresponding engine to perform the synthesis, and saves the resulting FITS file.

property salim_B#

Parameters for Salim et al. (2018) dust law.

property salim_RV#

Parameters for Salim et al. (2018) dust law.

property salim_a0#

Parameters for Salim et al. (2018) dust law.

property salim_a1#

Parameters for Salim et al. (2018) dust law.

property salim_a2#

Parameters for Salim et al. (2018) dust law.

property salim_a3#

Parameters for Salim et al. (2018) dust law.

property scale_dust_redshift#

Redshift scaling/normalization for dust optical depth. Defaults to “Vogelsberger20”. Otherwise, provide a dictionary type input with keys of ‘z’ and ‘tau_dust’.

Type:

str or dict

set_params(**kwargs)[source]#

Sets multiple parameters at once using keyword arguments.

This provides a convenient way to update the synthesizer’s configuration. Any invalid parameter names will be ignored with a warning.

Parameters:

**kwargs – Keyword arguments where keys match attribute names (e.g., dim_kpc=50, ssp_code=’BAGPIPES’).

property sim_file#

Path to the input HDF5 simulation data file.

Type:

str

property ssp_code#

The stellar population synthesis code to use (‘FSPS’ or ‘BAGPIPES’).

Type:

str

property ssp_filepath#

Path to a pre-computed SSP grid HDF5 file.

If None, the default SSP grid packaged with galsyn will be used, selected based on the ssp_code (‘FSPS’ or ‘BAGPIPES’).

Type:

str or None

property ssp_interpolation_method#

Interpolation method for the SSP grid (‘nearest’, ‘linear’, ‘cubic’).

Type:

str

property t_esc#

Escape time for young stars in Gyr. Defaults to 0.01.

property use_precomputed_ssp#

If True, use a pre-computed SSP grid file for synthesis.

Type:

bool

property vdmc#

IMF parameter defined in van Dokkum (2008).

Only used if ssp_code=FSPS and imf_type=3. Default: 0.08.

Type:

float

property z#

The redshift of the galaxy being synthesized.

Type:

float
